header.welcome_text: MHTECH Consulting supports your digital transformation

hero.main_title: MH Tech Consulting – Your partner in IT consulting and technology staffing
hero.description: MH Tech Consulting supports businesses in their technology projects by offering IT consulting, cybersecurity, DevOps, digital design and IT operations services. We also provide qualified IT talent to meet organizations' recruitment needs.

about.title: Modern technology solutions to support your growth
about.description: MH Tech Consulting supports businesses in their technology projects by offering IT consulting, cybersecurity, DevOps, digital design and IT operations services. We also provide qualified IT talent to meet organizations' recruitment needs.
about.expertise_text: IT and IT solutions, web and application development, cybersecurity, digital design and digital transformation.
about.why_choose_text: Modern technological expertise, tailored solutions, security, reliability and results-oriented strategic support.

services.title: 4 areas of expertise to make your IT projects successful

testimonials.title: What our clients say
testimonials.review_text: Absolutely fantastic experience! The team exceeded our expectations and delivered a solution that perfectly met our needs. Their attention to detail and commitment to quality are unmatched.

contact.title: Let's talk about your technology solutions
contact.description: Do you have a technology project or want to modernize your IT infrastructure? The MHTECH Consulting team is ready to support you with solutions tailored to your needs.
contact.message_placeholder: Describe your project or your need

faq.title: Do you have questions in mind? Get the answers now
faq.answer1: From initial analysis to implementation, we prioritize quality, reliability and customer satisfaction in every intervention. Make us your trusted partner to achieve your goals.
faq.question2: Will the solution be tailored to my business?
faq.answer2: Absolutely. We design each custom solution based on your company's specific needs, industry sector and strategic objectives.
faq.answer3: We support you through all preparation stages: initial audit, detailed planning, team training and progressive implementation to ensure a smooth transition.
faq.question4: How to choose the right solution?
faq.answer4: Our team of experts analyzes your needs, existing infrastructure and future goals to recommend the most suitable and efficient solution.

about_page.main_title: Your partner to design, develop and secure your digital solutions
about_page.description: MHTECH Consulting is a company specializing in technology services and IT consulting. We combine technical expertise, innovation and creativity to provide effective solutions for modern businesses.
about_page.mission_desc: Help organizations integrate modern technology solutions that improve their productivity, secure their infrastructure and strengthen their competitiveness.
about_page.vision_desc: Become a leading technology partner for businesses looking to modernize their systems, develop their digital solutions and strengthen their digital security.
about_page.services_title: Our areas of intervention for digital transformation
about_page.service1_desc: Implementation, maintenance and optimization of IT infrastructure.
about_page.service2_desc: Creation of web platforms, applications and tailor-made digital solutions.
about_page.service3_desc: System protection, vulnerability analysis and digital defense strategy.
about_page.service4_desc: Design of visuals, interfaces and high-value communication media.
about_page.service5_desc: Cloud solutions, automation and modern technology platforms for business.
about_page.service6_desc: Support and advice to align technology with your business objectives.
about_page.value3_desc: System and data protection at the heart of our solutions
about_page.value4_desc: A close working relationship to understand your needs
about_page.value6_desc: Technical expertise at the service of your growth

services_page.intro_title: Tailor-made IT solutions for your business
services_page.intro_description: MH Tech Consulting supports you in all your technology projects with expertise and innovation
services_page.service1_desc:
Complete protection for your systems:
• Security audit and vulnerability analysis
• Implementation of protection solutions
• Team training and awareness
• Intrusion testing and pentesting
• GDPR compliance and security standards
services_page.service2_desc:
Optimize your infrastructure:
• Cloud migration and management (AWS, Azure, GCP)
• CI/CD automation
• Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, Ansible)
• Containerization (Docker, Kubernetes)
• Performance monitoring and optimization
services_page.service3_desc:
Modern and efficient interfaces:
• UI/UX design and interface design
• Web and mobile application development
• Graphic design and visual identity
• Prototyping and user testing
• User experience optimization
services_page.service4_desc:
Support and maintenance for your systems:
• Technical support level 1, 2 and 3
• System and network administration
• Incident and problem management
• Preventive and corrective maintenance
• Technical documentation and procedures
services_page.cta_text: Need a personalized IT solution for your business?
services_page.contact_title: Let's Build Your Next Technology Solution
services_page.contact_description: Do you have a technology project or want to modernize your IT infrastructure? The MHTECH Consulting team is ready to support you with solutions tailored to your needs.
services_page.form_message_placeholder: Describe your project or your need
services_page.process_step1_text: We analyze your challenges to target the most suitable solution.
services_page.process_step2_text: We discuss with you to understand your business and technical objectives.
services_page.process_step3_text: You get a clear, consistent and personalized roadmap.
services_page.process_step4_text: We deploy, secure and evolve your solution over time.
services_page.newsletter_text: Follow our insights on security, infrastructure and digital transformation.

staffing_page.intro_title: Find the IT talent you need
staffing_page.intro_description: MH Tech Consulting connects the best IT skills with innovative companies
staffing_page.for_companies_description: Looking to strengthen your team with qualified IT experts? MH Tech Consulting helps you quickly recruit the best talent for your technology projects.
staffing_page.talent1_desc: Full Stack, Front-end, Back-end, Mobile, DevOps - Qualified developers for all your technical needs.
staffing_page.talent2_desc: UI/UX designers, graphic designers, user experience experts to create high-performance interfaces.
staffing_page.talent3_desc: IT security specialists, pentesters, SOC analysts to protect your systems.
staffing_page.talent4_desc: Project Managers, Scrum Masters, Product Owners to lead your technology initiatives.
staffing_page.talent5_desc: Experts in architecture, cloud, data science and artificial intelligence for your strategic projects.
staffing_page.talent6_desc: System administrators, support technicians, IT operators to maintain your infrastructure.
staffing_page.for_candidates_description: Are you an IT professional looking for new opportunities? MH Tech Consulting supports you in your career development with stimulating missions and innovative projects.
staffing_page.candidate_benefit1_desc: Access to diversified projects in different sectors: finance, health, e-commerce, industry and more.
staffing_page.candidate_benefit2_desc: Support throughout your journey, from mission search to integration into your new team.

testimonials_page.testimonial1_text: MHTECH Consulting has transformed our IT infrastructure. Their technical expertise and responsiveness exceeded our expectations. A team of highly qualified professionals who truly understand business challenges.
testimonials_page.testimonial2_text: Thanks to MHTECH's IT staffing service, we quickly found expert profiles for our digital transformation project. Personalized support and very high level consultants.
testimonials_page.testimonial3_text: Trusted partner for our company for 3 years. MHTECH supports us on all our IT needs with professionalism and efficiency. Their consulting approach brings real strategic added value.
